name: Stir Fry Ginger Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the chicken breast filets.
2. Add butter and seasonings (ginger, garlic).
3. Stir in broccoli, snow peas, water chestnuts, and chicken broth.
4. Gradually mix in cornstarch mixture until well combined.
5. Place dish in roasting pan.
6. Cover with hot water to halfway up the sides of the pan.
7. Cook over medium heat for 10-12 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
8. Stir fry for an additional 2-3 minutes, adjusting seasoning if needed.
